betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Armors§f

§aNTM's custom damage system — DT, DR, and RR determine how armor protects you. JEI has all recipes.§f

§6Damage Threshold (DT)§f: Flat reduction. Damage ≤ DT = 0 damage, no knockback.
§6Damage Resistance (DR)§f: % reduction after DT. Multiplicative.
§6Radiation Resistance (RR)§f: Per-piece, summed. Formula: 10^(-totalRR). RR 1 = 90% reduction.

§6Combat Armor§f: Steel → Titanium → Advanced Alloy → Cobalt → Starmetal → Schrabidium → CMB → Dineutronium.
§6Hazmat Armor§f: Hazmat → Advanced → High-Performance → Liquidator → PaA Battle Hazmat.

§cNote§f: Damage types (Explosion, Fire, Physical, Energy) each have separate DT/DR. AP ammo reduces DR, DTN reduces DT.
